0.q: Gat1 levels were also very low in a Δcnb1 mutant lacking the regulatory subunit of calcineurin.

1.q: PMR1 up-regulation was abolished by deletion of the GATA-type transcription factor GAT2 in a HpΔure2 genetic background

2.q: The reporter 4xCDRE-lacZ, containing calcineurin-dependent response elements in its promoter, revealed that calcineurin activation was reduced in HpΔure2.

3.q: Disruption of HpURE2 resulted in low intracellular Ca2+ levels.

4.q: calcineurin activation was reduced in HpΔure2

5.q: a Δcnb1 mutant lacking the regulatory subunit of calcineurin

6.q: HpΔure2 showed an increased expression of the gene PMR1 encoding the Golgi Ca2+-ATPase.

7.q: Disruption of HpURE2 resulted in low levels of the GATA-type transcription factor Gat1.

8.q: Disruption of HpURE2 resulted in no induction of ENA1.
